evals.prompt: Create a script that requests the color camera texture from the right eye of the Spectacles and assigns it to a material parameter called 'CameraFeed'.
evals.expected_output: A script using CameraModule.requestTexture and CameraRequest.
expectations: Inside the callback, sets material.mainPass.CameraFeed = texture

evals.prompt: Write a logic that uses CropTextureProvider to take a square crop of the center of the camera feed and saves it to a texture asset.
evals.expected_output: A script configuring CropTextureProvider at runtime.
expectations: Sets crop.inputTexture to the camera output
Configures sourceCenter and sourceSize for a center square crop
Uses the resulting crop.outputTexture in a material or ML input
